title: Application
description: Represents an application registration in Microsoft Entra ID. Defines the app's identity configuration, credentials, permissions requested, and reply URLs.

id.description: Unique identifier for the application object (GUID). This is the object ID, not the appId.

appId.description: The unique application identifier assigned by Microsoft Entra ID (also known as the client ID)

displayName.description: The display name for the application

description.description: An optional description of the application

signInAudience.description: Specifies which Microsoft accounts are supported for the application

identifierUris.description: URIs that uniquely identify the application within its Azure AD tenant or verified custom domain

requiredResourceAccess.description: Specifies the resources that the application needs access to and the set of OAuth permission scopes and app roles needed under each resource

appRoles.description: Collection of roles defined for the application that can be assigned to users, groups, or service principals

keyCredentials.description: Collection of certificate credentials associated with the app

publicClient.description: Public client settings for mobile and desktop apps

tags.description: Custom strings used to categorize and identify the application

createdDateTime.description: The date and time the application was registered
